The Complete MRO
Management Platform

Fleet airworthiness, work orders, digital logbooks, and parts inventory — unified in one powerful platform built for serious aviation operations.

Platform Features

Everything your operation needs,
nothing it doesn't

Airways brings every aspect of your MRO operation into one streamlined platform — from first squawk to final sign-off.

✈️

Fleet Airworthiness

Real-time visibility into every aircraft's airworthiness status. Never miss an inspection, AD, or service limit again.

  • Airworthiness Directive (AD) tracking
  • Inspection interval management
  • Automated due-date alerts
  • Life-limited part monitoring
🔧

Work Order Management

Complete MRO workflow from initial quote to return-to-service release. Track every task, tech, and part in real time.

  • Quote to invoice workflow
  • Technician time & task tracking
  • Parts requisition & consumption
  • Digital sign-off and release
📋

Digital PlaneFax™ Records

FAA-compliant digital maintenance logs and logbooks. Access complete aircraft history from anywhere, anytime.

  • FAA-compliant digital logbooks
  • Searchable maintenance history
  • Warranty tracking & documentation
  • One-click records export
📦

Parts Inventory & Procurement

End-to-end parts management with lot traceability, recall alerts, and integrated purchasing — right where you need it.

  • Life-limited part tracking by serial
  • Lot recall management
  • Purchase order workflow
  • Multi-location inventory

Ready to run a tighter operation?

Join hundreds of aviation professionals who rely on Airways every day to keep their fleet airworthy, their records clean, and their business moving.

The complete MRO management platform for aviation professionals who take airworthiness seriously.

Platform

Inventory
Parts stock, life-limited tracking, and work order availability
🔍
Part # Description Class S/N · Lot # Manufacturer Condition Status Qty Life / Shelf Bin 8130-3
🚨
Life-Limited Parts require back-to-birth traceability per 14 CFR 43.10. Parts at or beyond life limit must be scrapped immediately — no exceptions, no extensions. Every removal from aircraft must update TSN/CSN here.
ℹ️
Expendable parts are tracked by lot/batch number and expiry date — not individual serial numbers. Use the Batch Recall tool to quarantine an entire lot instantly.
⛔
Quarantined parts cannot be installed on any aircraft. They must be physically segregated from serviceable stock and clearly marked. Disposition required before any return to service.
⚡ Batch Recall Tool
Enter a lot/batch number to immediately quarantine all matching parts. This action is logged and triggers notifications to any open work orders using that batch.

Firebase Setup
Configure Auth, Firestore and Storage
🔥 Setup Guide — 5 Minutes
1
Create Firebase Project
Go to console.firebase.google.com → Add project → name it "airways-mro"
2
Add Web App
Project Settings → Add app → Web → Copy the firebaseConfig object
3
Enable Email/Password Auth
Authentication → Sign-in method → Email/Password → Enable
4
Create Firestore Database
Firestore Database → Create database → Start in test mode
5
Paste Config Below → Save
Fill in each field from your firebaseConfig object and click Save & Test
Firebase Configuration
Firestore Collections
CollectionDescriptionFieldsStatus
usersAll platform users (both types)uid, role, firstName, lastName, email, org, aircraft[]Pending
aircraftAircraft registryreg, make, model, year, owner, home_airport, hoursPending
requestsService requestsid, status, aircraft, owner, mro, quote, activity[]Pending
workordersMRO work ordersid, requestId, status, tech, cost, parts[]Pending
invoicesBilling recordsid, workOrderId, amount, status, issuedAtPending
notificationsPush/email logtype, to, subject, body, sentAt, readPending
